title: poliomintha conjunctrix
intro: Poliomintha conjunctrix, also known as Mexican mint marigold, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poliomintha conjunctrix include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared for consumption in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
